observations.description: The room is empty, with two tables in the center covered with plastic sheets. One table has two bins with sand and toys, and the other has a bin with colorful blocks. There are also some small cups with candles on a shelf to the right.
Children start to enter the room, walking towards the tables. One child in a light-colored dress walks to the right side of the room, while others gather around the tables.
More children and adults enter the room. The children gather around the tables, engaging with the sand and blocks. Adults are standing around, some observing, and some interacting with the children.
The children are actively playing with the materials on the tables. Adults are still present, some taking photos or videos with their phones, and others kneeling to interact with the children.
The children continue to play, with adults closely supervising and engaging with them. One adult in a floral dress kneels near the table with blocks, helping a child.
The children are fully immersed in their play. Adults are still around, some standing, some kneeling, and some holding babies, all observing the children's activities.
The children are still engaged with the sensory bins. Adults are observing and taking pictures. One adult in a red shirt is actively helping a child with the sand bin.
The activity continues with children playing and adults supervising. One adult in a floral dress is sitting on a low bench to the left, observing the scene.
Children are still playing with the sand and blocks. Adults are scattered around the room, some talking to each other, some taking photos, and some directly interacting with the children.
The children are focused on their play. Adults are still present, observing and interacting. One adult in a yellow dress is holding a baby and watching the children.
The children continue to play with the bins. Adults are observing, some with phones, and some helping the children with the materials.
The children are still engaged in the activity. Adults are observing and interacting with the children, some kneeling to be at their eye level.
The children are playing with the bins, and adults are supervising. One adult in a red shirt is helping a child with the sand bin, while another adult in a floral dress is sitting on the bench.
The children are still playing, and adults are observing and interacting. One adult in a yellow dress is holding a baby and watching the children play.
The children are still engaged in the activity. Adults are present, some taking photos, some talking, and some helping the children.
The children are playing with the bins. Adults are observing and interacting with the children. One adult in a red shirt is helping a child with the sand bin.
The children are still playing, and adults are supervising. One adult in a floral dress is sitting on the bench, observing the scene.
The children are engaged in the activity. Adults are present, some taking photos, some talking, and some helping the children.
The children are playing with the bins. Adults are observing and interacting with the children. One adult in a yellow dress is holding a baby and watching the children play.
The children are still engaged in the activity. Adults are present, some taking photos, some talking, and some helping the children.
